description: Retheme PixelOfficeConstants, PixelCharacter (add waitingForWork state), and PixelOfficeViewModel to support the House of Kiroween theme and ACP idle detection.
steps: Step 1 - Update PixelOfficeConstants.swift: Replace characterPalettes with ghost-themed palettes (purples, violets, teals, spectral blues, ghostly greens - 8 palettes using body/glow pattern). Add static color hex strings for haunted mansion: darkPurpleWall, floorDark, floorLight, ghostGlow.

Step 2 - Update PixelCharacter.swift: Add 'case waitingForWork' to CharacterState enum. Add static method from(taskStatus:agentStatus:) -> CharacterState? where AgentStatus is from Agent.swift. When taskStatus == .working && agentStatus == .idle, return .waitingForWork. Otherwise delegate to existing from(taskStatus:). Keep existing from(taskStatus:) unchanged.

Step 3 - Update PixelOfficeViewModel.swift: Add method updateCharacters(from tasks: [AgentTask], agentStatuses: [UUID: AgentStatus]) that uses CharacterState.from(taskStatus:agentStatus:) instead of from(taskStatus:). Handle .waitingForWork in targetPosition same as .working/.idle (desk position). CRITICAL: update BOTH the macOS block AND the Linux fallback block identically.
Step 4 - Update PixelOfficeTests.swift: Add tests for waitingForWork mapping, from(taskStatus:agentStatus:) with various combos, and updateCharacters(from:agentStatuses:) method.
acceptance_criteria: swift test passes all tests with 0 failures
PixelOfficeViewModel has updateCharacters(from:agentStatuses:) method in both platform blocks
